series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Organized Crime Investigative Commission (OOCIC) Meeting Packet
series_metadata.series_description: Meeting packets prepared for Ohio Organized Crime Investigative Commission (OOCIC) meetings per ORC 177.01. Records include, but are not limited to, agenda, copy of previous meeting''s minutes, and copies of materials for discussion at meeting.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years and until no longer of administrative value, unless scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years and until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
